# Drop your videos here

Put your `.mp4` files in this folder using these exact names, and they appear on the site automatically (no code change needed):

| Filename | Where it shows | Suggested |
|----------|----------------|-----------|
| `hero.mp4` | Hero background (full-screen) | Abstract tech / coding / motion, 10–20s loop, muted, 1080p |
| `mockup-1.mp4` | Featured Work — showcase 1 (Hotel) | Screen recording of a website scrolling |
| `mockup-2.mp4` | Featured Work — showcase 2 (Car rental) | Screen recording of a website / app |

Until you add them, the site plays free placeholder clips so nothing looks broken.

## Free video sources (no attribution needed)
- pexels.com/videos
- pixabay.com/videos
- coverr.co

Keep files small (under ~10 MB each) so the page loads fast. Compress with Handbrake if needed.
